data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Reduces decision fatigue by limiting the number of options presented to users upon directly entering the platform.
data.technical_spec: Optimized landing page with recommended content based on user history.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Ensures buttons and clickable areas are optimally sized and placed for easy access by users.
data.technical_spec: Proximity-based placements; minimum size standards for clickable elements.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Leverages familiar UI patterns from other Google services to reduce learning curves for new users.
data.technical_spec: Consistent navigation and layout borrowed from broader Google ecosystem.

data.title: Gestalt Principles
data.description: Uses principles of visual perception such as similarity and proximity to enhance content organization.
data.technical_spec: Thumbnail design and categorization, UI grouping elements.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Creates an appealing interface that users perceive as easier to use.
data.technical_spec: Design philosophy focuses on aesthetics via color theory, typography, and layout standards.
